examples.name: Customer Feedback
examples.description: Collect feedback with self-registration and role-based results. Multi-user with OAuth2 support.

examples.name: Expense Tracker
examples.description: Log your spending and keep track of where your money goes.

examples.name: Habit Tracker
examples.description: Track daily habits and review your consistency over time.

examples.name: My Chores
examples.description: Track household chores, assign them to family members, and mark them done.

examples.name: Personal Journal
examples.description: A private diary to capture your thoughts and moods.

examples.name: Reading List
examples.description: Track books you want to read, are reading, or have finished.

examples.name: Recipe Book
examples.description: Save and browse your favorite recipes.

examples.name: Quiz Master
examples.description: Take multiple-choice quizzes, create your own, and track improvement over time.

examples.name: Team Survey
examples.description: Multi-user survey with self-registration. Admin-only results and charts.

examples.name: Team Wiki
examples.description: Multi-user knowledge base with Markdown articles. Editor role and CURRENT_USER defaults.

examples.name: Team Tasks
examples.description: Multi-user task tracker with manager role, row-level ownership, and role-gated actions.

examples.name: Time Off Requests
examples.description: Multi-user approval workflow with manager review, ownership, and status tracking.

examples.name: To-Do List
examples.description: Track tasks, set priorities, and mark them complete.

examples.name: Project Dashboard
examples.description: Multi-user project management with tabbed dashboard, charts, and manager role.
